project_context: Read AGENTS.md at the project root for complete context, architecture, data model, and coding standards. Read TODO.md for current task priorities.
rules: Engine code (client/src/engine/) must have ZERO React or DOM dependencies
Components access engine/store only through hooks - never import stores directly
TypeScript strict mode - no any types
All interactive elements must have 44x44px minimum touch targets
Only animate transform and opacity - never layout properties
Use @/ path alias for all imports
All project-modifying actions must be undoable via zundo
Video export uses Mediabunny CanvasSource (NOT the deprecated mp4-muxer)
Lazy-load heavy deps: Mediabunny on export, ffmpeg.wasm as last resort, WaveSurfer on audio add
